title: Intune Analytics - Endpoint Analytics

tiles.title: ⏱️ Avg Boot Time (sec)
tiles.query:
StartupPerformance
| where IngestionTime > ago(7d)
| summarize round(avg(TotalBootTimeInMs) / 1000, 1)

tiles.title: 💥 Apps with Issues
tiles.query: AppReliability_Current | where AppCrashCount > 0 or AppHangCount > 0 | count

tiles.title: 📈 Boot Time Trend (7 days)
tiles.query:
StartupPerformance
| where IngestionTime > ago(7d)
| summarize AvgBootMs=avg(TotalBootTimeInMs) by bin(StartTime, 1d)
| extend AvgBootSec = round(AvgBootMs / 1000, 1)
| project StartTime, AvgBootSec

tiles.title: 🐌 Slow Startup Devices (>60s)
tiles.query:
SlowStartupDevices(60000)
| take 15
| project DeviceName, UserPrincipalName, AvgBootTimeMs, MaxBootTimeMs, Model

tiles.title: ⏱️ Boot Time Distribution
tiles.query:
StartupPerformance
| where IngestionTime > ago(7d)
| extend BootBucket = case(
    TotalBootTimeInMs < 30000, '<30s (Fast)',
    TotalBootTimeInMs < 60000, '30-60s (Normal)',
    TotalBootTimeInMs < 120000, '60-120s (Slow)',
    '>120s (Very Slow)')
| summarize Count=count() by BootBucket

tiles.title: 💥 Most Problematic Apps
tiles.query:
ProblematicApps()
| take 10
| project AppDisplayName, AppPublisher, TotalIssues, AppCrashCount, AppHangCount

tiles.title: 📊 Apps by Crash Count
tiles.query:
AppReliability_Current
| where AppCrashCount > 0
| top 10 by AppCrashCount
| project AppDisplayName, AppCrashCount

tiles.title: 🔄 Restart Categories
tiles.query:
StartupPerformance
| where IngestionTime > ago(7d)
| summarize Count=count() by RestartCategory
| order by Count desc

description: Deep dive into Endpoint Analytics - startup performance, app reliability, and device health scores. Identify slow devices and problematic applications.
